title: Junior Business Development Manager at Embassy Office Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Embassy Office Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!
